[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01000001 2
1 00100010 2
2 10000100 2
3 10100101 4
4 00111100 4
5 11010011 5
6 11010110 5
7 10010110 4
